_note: The LIVE concentrated thematic-momentum book, locked and going forward from launch. Equal-weight ~10% each. Managed by: ride winners, exit on trend break (close < 50d MA), refill empty slots with the next hottest in-uptrend names.
_exit_note: Trend break = close below the 200-day trend line (consistent with how names are selected, so fresh picks don't instantly trip it). The -40% from high is a wide disaster stop for these high-volatility names, which routinely swing 30%+ while still trending up.
